title: 1000x Barista+ Premium Wooden Coffee Stirrers (Multiple Pack Sizes) Boxed Eco-Friendly Coffee Stirrers Suitable for All Hot Drinks Upgraded Coffee Sticks/Drink Stirrers (1000)
features: Eco-Friendly Choice: Our wooden coffee stirrers are made from sustainable materials, making them an eco-conscious choice for your beverage stirring needs.
Versatile Usage: These 5.5" long wooden sticks are ideal for coffee, cocktails, and more. Use them as coffee stirrers or cocktail stirrers to enhance your beverage presentation.
Durable and Reliable: Crafted with precision, these wooden stirrers are built to withstand hot and cold beverages without compromising their integrity.

Convenient Pack Sizes: With multiple size wooden stirrers packs, you'll have an ample supply for your home, office, or catering business, ensuring you never run out of stirring options. come boxed for ease of use
Disposable and Hygienic: Say goodbye to washing and reusing stirrers. Our disposable wooden stirring sticks are convenient and hygienic, making cleanup a breeze.
description: Eco-Friendly Wooden Coffee Stirrers – 5.5-Inch Disposable Stir Sticks in Bulk for Hot and Cold Beverages Our wooden coffee stirrers are perfect for cafes, coffee shops, and home use. Made from natural birchwood, these biodegradable coffee stirrers offer an eco-friendly alternative to plastic. Ideal for both hot and cold drinks, these disposable coffee stirrers come in a bulk 1000 coffee stirers pack, 2000 coffee stirers & 5000 coffee stirers making them perfect for large gatherings or commercial use. These 5.5-inch wooden stirrers are heat-resistant and smooth to the touch, ensuring no splinters. Whether you’re stirring coffee, tea, or cocktails, these compostable stir sticks are designed for durability. Our wooden drink stirrers are also non-toxic, ensuring they are food-safe for all types of beverages. Perfect for businesses looking for bulk wooden stir sticks, our eco-safe wooden stirrers are also unbleached, providing a natural appearance that complements any coffee shop or event. Ideal for use with biodegradable cups, our round-ended wooden stirrers and smooth-end wooden stir sticks ensure a comfortable stirring experience. improve your drink station with these natural wooden coffee stirrers and wooden cocktail stirrers, perfect for any eco-conscious business. Choose the best in disposable stir sticks with our 5-inch wooden stir sticks or wooden stirring sticks for hot beverages, ensuring your guests enjoy an environmentally-friendly solution. Whether you need compostable stir sticks bulk for events or wooden stir sticks for daily use, we’ve got you covered.
